title: Mobile App Authentication Request
excerpt: We use Okta for authentication on Monday.com.  The native iOS app though seems to auto-terminate a session and then requires the user to re-enter their email address and the instance URL every time.  Please make the iOS …

posts.author: JeffHallett (Jeff Hallett)
posts.cookedHtml: We use Okta for authentication on Monday.com. The native iOS app though seems to auto-terminate a session and then requires the user to re-enter their email address and the instance URL every time. Please make the iOS app remember the last set of user information rather than requiring it to be re-entered every time.

posts.author: bozday (Matt Bozek)
posts.cookedHtml: @JeffHallett Did you find a resolution to this or is this still an issue? We also use Okta for authentication and were exploring the iOS app.
